FindTag.summary: Finds the first tag in a text value.

RemoveSection.summary: Removes a section from a text value.
RemoveSection.returns: The text with the section removed.

RemoveTags.summary: Removes tags from a text value.
RemoveTags.returns: The text with the tags removed.

StringWithDelimiters.summary: Retrieves a string including the supplied delimiters.
StringWithDelimiters.returns: The delimited text including the delimiters.
